statement: Author-once -> multi-target agent-artefact emit is a commoditised category with at least three independent maintainers (ruler, rulesync, ai-rulez) plus a corporate entrant (block/ai-rules), not a novel capability.

evidence.quote: Complete AI development workflow for 19+ tools... generate native configs for Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini, Codex and more.
Manage AI rules, commands, and skills across multiple coding agents from one place.

falsifier: Demonstration that all named tools are forks of one codebase, or that none can actually emit to multiple targets simultaneously.
